Localization.Description: Attempt to perform an operation with an antivirus network object

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Administrator failed to change object "{object.name}" of "{object.type}" type on Dr.Web management server {event_src.host}
Administrator {subject.account.name} created object "{object.account.name}" of "{object.type}" type on Dr.Web management server {event_src.host}
Administrator created object "{object.name}" of "{object.type}" type on Dr.Web management server {event_src.host}
Administrator {subject.account.name} changed object "{object.account.name}" of "{object.type}" type on Dr.Web management server {event_src.host}
Administrator {subject.account.name} failed to change object "{object.name}" of "{object.type}" type on Dr.Web management server {event_src.host}
Administrator {subject.account.name} failed to delete object "{object.name}" of "{object.type}" type on Dr.Web management server {event_src.host}
Administrator deleted object "{object.name}" of "{object.type}" type on Dr.Web management server {event_src.host}
Administrator {subject.account.name} failed to create object "{object.name}" of "{object.type}" type on Dr.Web management server {event_src.host}
Administrator {subject.account.name} changed object "{object.name}" of "{object.type}" type on Dr.Web management server {event_src.host}
Administrator {subject.account.name} deleted object "{object.account.name}" of "{object.type}" type on Dr.Web management server {event_src.host}
Administrator {subject.account.name} created object "{object.name}" of "{object.type}" type on Dr.Web management server {event_src.host}
Administrator failed to create object "{object.name}" of "{object.type}" type on Dr.Web management server {event_src.host}
Administrator changed object "{object.name}" of "{object.type}" type on Dr.Web management server {event_src.host}
Administrator {subject.account.name} deleted object "{object.name}" of "{object.type}" type on Dr.Web management server {event_src.host}
Administrator failed to delete object "{object.name}" of "{object.type}" type on Dr.Web management server {event_src.host}
